hypothesis: On GER40 M15 during the London/Frankfurt cash session (07:00-15:00 UTC), a close beyond the prior 20-bar Donchian channel in a high-ADX regime produces sustained momentum continuation profitable at 2R, because index opens concentrate directional order flow.

regime_filter.rationale: Only trade breakouts when directional strength (ADX>=22) and sufficient volatility (ATR above 40th pct) are present; avoids fakeouts in dead ranges.

entry.long: close > Donchian_high[1] AND body >= 0.6*ATR14 AND regime_on AND in_session
entry.short: close < Donchian_low[1] AND body >= 0.6*ATR14 AND regime_on AND in_session

exit.trailing: chandelier: 2.5 * ATR14 from highest/lowest since entry, activates after +1R
